tools.name: get_country
tools.description: Get detailed data about a country by name, slug, or ISO code. Returns population, area, capital, region, coordinates, and 20+ statistics.

query.description: Country name (e.g. "Brazil"), slug (e.g. "brazil"), or ISO code (e.g. "BR")

tools.name: search_countries
tools.description: Search for countries by name or keyword, with optional region filter. Returns a list of matching countries with basic data.

query.description: Search term (country name, partial name, or keyword)

tools.name: search_cities
tools.description: Search for cities worldwide by name. Returns matching cities from a database of 13.4M cities with population and country.

query.description: City name or partial name to search for (min 2 characters)

tools.name: list_cities_by_country
tools.description: List cities in a specific country, sorted by population or name. Supports minimum population filter. Covers 13.4M cities globally.

min_population.description: Minimum population filter (e.g. 1000000 for cities above 1M)

tools.name: compare_countries
tools.description: Compare two countries side by side across all available metrics: population, area, GDP, HDI, life expectancy, and more.

country_b.description: Second country name or slug (e.g. "argentina", "South Korea")
